title: Pepegwoh 2 Now In Colors
description: Jump into a world filled with things to explore and magic to uncover. Can you defeat the bosses?
body: The modpack is intended for a group of friends to play together. Explore a bunch of cool and interesting structures. Go in depth in magic mods or grow your tech factory. Try your mettle against a bunch of bosses or enjoy building with a lot of new blocks and furnishing.
